content:
@PAY-1234 @api @payment
Feature: Create payment API

  Background:
    Given the API base URL is configured
    And the "Authorization" header is available

  @TC_001 @positive
  Scenario: Create payment with valid request
    Given I prepare a valid POST request for "/api/payments"
    When I send the request
    Then the response status code should be 201
assumptions: Authorization header is resolved from credential reference
